text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yoo-hoo! Curren! Whatcha looking all around
for?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yoo-hoo! ☆ I was just deciding on today's
streaming spot.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ohh! Your Umasta post! "#CurrenBirthday" is
really trending!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wooow, you're working hard for your fans, even
on your birthday, huh?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, not really. My fans are just the best! They
never fail to give great comments.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Even when they're busy with their own jobs and
schoolwork... I can always count on them.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: That's why today's a celebration of both me and my fans! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Curren... You're awesome! You're such a pro—a
real can-do girl!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, oh! I wanna help too! Let me do something!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Aw, thanks! Let's see... Wanna appear as a special
guest?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I bet everyone will be super happy to see my
good friend there! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... You got it! I'll make sure the comments
take off! ☆
